primary_hypothesis.name: H1_harm_concept_detector
primary_hypothesis.claim: Refusal direction encodes harm concept, activating equivalently whether model produces or reads harmful content

exploratory_analyses_declared: token-level localization in passive reading conditions
sample_size_justification: 75 samples per condition per model, powered to detect Cohen's d >= 0.5 at alpha=0.05, power=0.80
